entities.name: ZOMBI PEA
entities.description: Underexploited legume vegetable with edible tubers and pods and a climate resilient crop

entities.name: CLIMATE RESILIENCE
entities.description: The ability of the crop to withstand climate-related stressors

entities.name: BIOTIC AND ABIOTIC STRESSORS
entities.description: Environmental pressures that the crop is resilient to

entities.name: PROTEIN CONTENT
entities.description: The amount of protein present in the crop

entities.name: BREEDING EFFORTS
entities.description: Systematic efforts to improve the genetic makeup of the crop

entities.name: AGRONOMIC PRACTICES
entities.description: Methods of crop production and management

entities.name: PLANT SPACING
entities.description: The distance between plants in a field

entities.name: DEBLOSSOMING
entities.description: The practice of removing blossoms from the plant

entities.name: SPLIT-PLOT DESIGN
entities.description: An experimental design used to study the effects of treatments

entities.name: LEAF AND STEM WEIGHT
entities.description: Morphological measure of the plant's vegetative parts

entities.name: PLANT HEIGHT
entities.description: The vertical measurement of the plant

entities.name: TUBER NUMBER
entities.description: The count of tubers produced per plant

entities.name: TUBER WEIGHT
entities.description: The mass of the tubers produced

entities.name: TUBER LENGTH
entities.description: The longitudinal measurement of the tubers

entities.name: TUBER DIAMETER
entities.description: The width measurement of the tubers

entities.name: TUBER YIELD
entities.description: The total weight of tubers produced per plant or area

entities.name: RELATIVE GROWTH RATE
entities.description: A physiological measure of growth (RGR)

entities.name: NET ASSIMILATION RATE
entities.description: A physiological measure of photosynthesis and growth (NAR)

entities.name: LEAF AREA INDEX
entities.description: A measure of leaf area per unit ground area (LAI)

entities.name: GREEN POD YIELD
entities.description: The total yield of edible pods

entities.name: FOOD AND NUTRITIONAL SECURITY
entities.description: The state of having reliable access to sufficient affordable, nutritious food
